title: Complex Arithmetic As Real-Pair Algebra

solver_reuse.target: complex real-pair algebra replay educational row
solver_reuse.pressure: The current rows are satisfiable exact real-pair arithmetic, conjugate-norm, and polynomial-root witnesses; they teach encoding but do not yet contain a checked algebraic contradiction.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote only after adding a false real-pair algebra or polynomial-root row with a source-linked LRA/NRA artifact; keep holomorphy, contour integration, residues, analytic continuation, and algebraic-closure theorems in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode real-pair complex arithmetic as deterministic NRA obligations.
Replay algebraic complex witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation.
